title: cyrtochilum cochleatum
intro: Cyrtochilum cochleatum, also known as the shell orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Cyrtochilum cochleatum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
